examples: He did not have much success, but tried not to get too disconsolate.
Now some of us were left disconsolate.
She is disconsolate at the death of her cat.
With Cheryl Tiegs as a disconsolate, wordless beauty sitting at a roadside rest stop.
Carla Devade appears, wearing tight corduroy trousers, flat shoes, and a disconsolate smile on her pretty Mediterranean face.
